mapper.insert: INSERT INTO grammar_library_questions (topic_id, question_type, prompt, options_json, answer, explanation_vi, translation_vi) VALUES (#{topicId}, #{questionType}, #{prompt}, #{optionsJson}, #{answer}, #{explanationVi}, #{translationVi})
mapper.select: SELECT id, topic_id, question_type, prompt, options_json, answer, explanation_vi, translation_vi, created_at FROM grammar_library_questions WHERE topic_id = #{topicId} ORDER BY id
